content.upload_description: Upload and add files to a scanned paper Lloyd George record.
Upload the summary file of an electronic health record. You might also call these a 'journal' or 'practice notes'. Upload this suymmary if, for example, GP2GP fails.

content.upload_title: Attachments to an electronic health record
content.upload_description: Upload other files that are part of the patient's EHR on your clinical system. For example, letters, laboratory reports and imaging. Upload these files if, for example GP2GP fails.
